title: Generation of mFwe knockout n2a cells from Yao CK et al. (2017)
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"a2jVw","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"vmApa","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"hVnQR","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"7BMfx","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4053,"guid":"41068AFD341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"pSpCas9(BB)-m/ratFwe-gRNA-2A-GFP plasmid by Lopofectamine 3000","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":95,"name":"Thermo Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4054,"guid":"41068B4E341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Trypsin ","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"2":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4055,"guid":"41068B9D341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"10% FBS/1XHBSS solution ","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Transfect 3 x 10 5 n2a cells cultured on 6-well plate with 2 µg of pSpCas9(BB)-m/ratFwe-gRNA-2A-GFP plasmid by Lopofectamine 3000 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) according to the manufacturer's instructions. undetermined
Culture the cells for three days.
Adjust the cell density to 1 x 10 6 per ml.
Filter the cells through 40 μm-Teflon mesh to eliminate aggregation.

After three-week culture, subject survival single cell-driven colonies to immunostaining and immunoblotting for mFwe2 to verify the knockout of mFwe2. One of confirmed mFwe knockout n2a cell lines was used in S9A Fig.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
